description: When DevSpec remote control is active (~/.devspec/remote-control.json), mirror turns to DevSpec deterministically via Stop/UserPromptSubmit hooks, and tear the poller down on SessionEnd. The `command -v node` guard makes the hook a silent no-op when Node.js is not installed, so sessions without Node never see a per-turn hook error (remote control just isn't available until Node is installed). SessionEnd is a best-effort prompt teardown for graceful ends (/clear, logout); the poller's owner-PID self-termination + connect-time reaper cover the ends SessionEnd never fires for (terminal close, crash, SIGKILL).

hooks.command: command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/remote-control-state.mjs" disable-local --agent "Claude Code" || true
